title: Scaling Through Training.
content: Recently on OLM's training, I found out you could scale the model as the knowledge keeps increasing, with a larger brain size, increasing model from 256M to 500M.

title: Scaling to 1B Parameters.
content: Polaris has officially scaled to 1 Billion parameters! This update increases its reasoning capabilities and knowledge breadth, marking a significant milestone in our training journey from 500M to 1B.
